creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
- Yes, this is the latest version:
 619606 Aug 27 21:45 x264-snapshot-20130827-2245-stable.tar.bz2

- config.log, config.h and config.mak are below

- which math.h shall I include:
# find / -name "math.h"
/usr/include/c++/4.2/tr1/math.h
/usr/include/math.h
/usr/local/include/wx-2.8/wx/math.h
/usr/local/include/FL/math.h
/usr/local/include/gpac/math.h
/usr/local/lib/gcc48/include/c++/tr1/math.h
/usr/local/lib/gcc47/include/c++/tr1/math.h
/usr/local/lib/gcc46/include/c++/tr1/math.h
/usr/local/lib/gcc49/include/c++/tr1/math.h

- sorry, what is pre-processor output?

platform:      IA64
system:        FREEBSD
cli:           yes
libx264:       internal
shared:        yes
static:        yes
asm:           no
interlaced:    yes
avs:           no
lavf:          no
ffms:          no
gpac:          yes
gpl:           yes
thread:        posix
opencl:        no
filters:       crop select_every 
debug:         yes
gprof:         no
strip:         no
PIC:           yes
visualize:     yes
bit depth:     8
chroma format: all

# config.h


#define ARCH_IA64 1
#define SYS_FREEBSD 1
#define HAVE_POSIXTHREAD 1
#define HAVE_THREAD 1
#define HAVE_VISUALIZE 1
#define HAVE_GPAC 1
#define HAVE_VECTOREXT 1
#define fseek fseeko
#define ftell ftello
#define HAVE_GPL 1
#define HAVE_INTERLACED 1
#define HAVE_MALLOC_H 0
#define HAVE_ALTIVEC 0
#define HAVE_ALTIVEC_H 0
#define HAVE_MMX 0
#define HAVE_ARMV6 0
#define HAVE_ARMV6T2 0
#define HAVE_NEON 0
#define HAVE_BEOSTHREAD 0
#define HAVE_WIN32THREAD 0
#define HAVE_LOG2F 0
#define HAVE_SWSCALE 0
#define HAVE_LAVF 0
#define HAVE_FFMS 0
#define HAVE_GF_MALLOC 0
#define HAVE_AVS 0
#define HAVE_CPU_COUNT 0
#define HAVE_OPENCL 0


# config.mak


SRCPATH=.
prefix=/usr/local
exec_prefix=${prefix}
bindir=${exec_prefix}/bin
libdir=${exec_prefix}/lib
includedir=${prefix}/include
ARCH=IA64
SYS=FREEBSD
CC=gcc
CFLAGS=-Wshadow -O1 -g -pipe -g -Wall -I. -I$(SRCPATH) -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -I/usr/X11R6/include -fPIC -fno-tree-vectorize
DEPMM=-MM -g0
DEPMT=-MT
LD=gcc -o 
LDFLAGS=-L/usr/X11R6/lib -lX11  -fstack-protector -L/usr/local/lib -lm -pthread
LIBX264=libx264.a
AR=ar rc 
RANLIB=ranlib
STRIP=strip
AS=
ASFLAGS= -DHAVE_ALIGNED_STACK=1 -DPIC -DHIGH_BIT_DEPTH=0 -DBIT_DEPTH=8
RC=
RCFLAGS=
EXE=
HAVE_GETOPT_LONG=1
DEVNULL=/dev/null
PROF_GEN_CC=-fprofile-generate
PROF_GEN_LD=-fprofile-generate
PROF_USE_CC=-fprofile-use
PROF_USE_LD=-fprofile-use
HAVE_OPENCL=no
default: cli
install: install-cli
SOSUFFIX=so
SONAME=libx264.so.136
SOFLAGS=-shared -Wl,-soname,$(SONAME)  -Wl,-Bsymbolic
default: lib-shared
install: install-lib-shared
default: lib-static
install: install-lib-static
LDFLAGSCLI = -lgpac -lz 
CLI_LIBX264 = $(LIBX264)
